same_behavior.description: `DispatchState.apply()` must keep a local pre-launch failure out of remote reconciliation.
same_behavior.suggestion: Set `DispatchState.not_started` before the provider launch boundary.

same_behavior_reworded.description: A pre-launch local error in `DispatchState.apply()` is not a remote dispatch.
same_behavior_reworded.suggestion: Set `DispatchState.not_started` before the provider launch boundary.

different_contract_same_file.description: `DispatchState.complete()` must preserve a confirmed provider launch after retry.
different_contract_same_file.suggestion: Persist `DispatchState.started` after a confirmed provider response.

opposite_contract.description: `DispatchState.apply()` must keep a local pre-launch failure out of remote reconciliation.
opposite_contract.suggestion: Persist `DispatchState.pending_uncertain` before the provider launch boundary.

scored_date.description: `load_preflight_panel()` must reject a scored panel that does not end on the requested completed day.
scored_date.suggestion: Require `load_preflight_panel()` to match the expected completed date exactly.

cached_runner.description: `CryptoBacktestRunner.run()` must validate every requested date window even when a runner is cached.
cached_runner.suggestion: Revalidate the requested window in `CryptoBacktestRunner.run()` before reuse.
